concerns.text: FR-005 mandates Wilcoxon Signed-Rank tests, but tasks T027 and T031 implement Linear Mixed-Effects Models (LMM). No task exists to implement the required Wilcoxon test, leaving the primary statistical requirement unaddressed.

FR-007 requires the system to 'calculate the classifier's precision and recall' on the ground truth subset. Task T017 only covers selection/saving. The calculation logic is missing from US1 and deferred to T029a (US3), creating a gap in the immediate deliverable for FR-007.

SC-006 requires precision/recall ≥ 0.85. Task T029a instructs the implementer to 'update spec.md SC-006' if the threshold is not met. There is no task to simply report the failure against the fixed requirement, violating the success criterion definition.

FR-008 requires matching on 'initial cyclomatic complexity and project size (LOC)'. Task T011a extracts repo metadata (stars, age), and T014 extracts complexity, but no task explicitly combines these specific covariates for the matching algorithm in T015, risking a missing implementation step for the required covariates.

Task T028a references 'hierarchical model p-values' and T027 implements LMM, but the spec (FR-005) and plan require Wilcoxon. This indicates a stale tag/description referencing a methodology (LMM) that does not exist in the current spec/plan, creating confusion.
